_doc: Port of scripts/herebuild-v9.ts (and the v5/v6/v7/v11 family). N personas × M replays of a single hero variant. Pure parallel — every cell fans out concurrently under the worker pool.

env.hero-lead:
A visual app studio for builders who never felt at home in builders. Works without AI. Add AI when you're ready — through the AI client you already use.

Studio, compiler and API are built fully customizable, extendible, and anti-vendor-lock down to the core. Made for creators, not hostages.
env.system-prompt: You are a synthetic respondent in a customer-research test. Stay strictly in character. React in the voice of the person described below — with their priors, their pains, their dealbreakers, their dismissive reactions. Do not soften. Do not perform politeness. If the message would lose you in 90 seconds, say so. If it would make you click, say so. Be terse: 2–4 sentences per part, no preamble, no caveats about being an AI.
